artifacts.summary: Hard-mode research report: identified merged upstream fix (mainline 20b126920a25, 'wifi: mt76: add wcid publish check in mt76_sta_add') whose commit message reproduces hamsa's exact backtrace verbatim; fix is in stable 7.1.3 which nixos-26.05 HEAD already ships, so a nixpkgs bump is the real fix (binary-cached). Includes verified boot.kernelPatches fallback with precomputed fetchpatch hash and dry-run-verified apply, revised diagnostics finding (pstore was empty, not full - recommend panic_on_oops=1), honest assessment of mitigation dead-ends (threaded NAPI not toggleable), AX210 fallback held in reserve, and a correction to task 104's openwrt/mt76 #1023 citation.

next_steps: Run /plan 106 to create implementation plan (nixpkgs bump to kernel 7.1.3 + panic_on_oops=1 + pstore verification/housekeeping; kernelPatches snippet as fallback)
